features.name: Project scaffold
features.description: Remix app with Tailwind, Prisma, shadcn/ui, env stubs

features.name: Database schema
features.description: Supabase PostgreSQL + Prisma ORM. Prisma datasource needs two URLs: DATABASE_URL (Connection Pooler, port 6543) and DIRECT_URL (direct connection, port 5432 — required for migrations). 8 Prisma models: PrepUnit, TierUnitSequence, QBankUnlocks, DirectionRef, Teacher, StudentPath, StudentUnitProgress, StudentAttempt. Teacher: clerkUserId + teacherCode for EC auth. StudentPath: clerkUserId for Clerk link, no exam_date. StudentAttempt: one row per item-attempt (fine granularity). StudentUnitProgress: current_phase enum = p0 / p1 (deprecated) / p1_pov_intro / p1_pov_encoding / p1_essay_encoding / p2. Note: p1 is kept as a deprecated enum value — PostgreSQL cannot drop enum values. New code never writes p1. Note: direction_ref and qbank_unlocks have no FKs by design (lookup table and denormalized Q Bank questions).

features.name: Clerk auth integration
features.description: Email/password + OAuth, session management, webhook for DB sync. Sign-up redirects to /onboarding/intro via afterSignUpUrl prop on <SignUp /> component.

features.name: Data ingestion
features.description: Import prep-unit JSON from Lab, write verbatim to PrepUnit, TierUnitSequence, QBankUnlocks, and DirectionRef tables (all 4 Lab-written tables). Pure write — no transformation or logic. practices array is now 14 items (was 12).

features.name: Onboarding flow
features.description: 4-screen flow: (1) /onboarding/intro — methodology explainer + tier guidance, CTA to tier selection; (2) /onboarding/tier — tier selection (50/80 units); (3) /onboarding/teacher-code — teacher code entry; (4) /onboarding/complete — how-to-study explainer, path assignment + content_version lock. No exam date. Duplicate-onboarding guard on each screen (redirect to /dashboard if StudentPath already exists).

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Student home: unit list (locked/in-progress/complete) + Question Bank entry point. Path complete state when all units done. Includes guiding content banner explaining the 3-step unit flow.

features.name: P0 — Cold essay
features.description: Two screens: (1) /unit/:unitId/p0/intro — phase entry screen with guiding content + question preview, CTA links to p0 write (no phase change); (2) /unit/:unitId/p0 — L4W cold write on model essay question, 40-min countdown, no scaffold, no peek. Artifact 1 sent to EC on submit. Save point: currentPhase advances to p1_pov_intro on submit.

features.name: Peek modal component
features.description: Reusable modal showing: essay text (colour-coded by lexical type), PoV cards (human-readable direction label, summary, topic sentence, blog link), lexical items panel. Available throughout PoV Encoding (F16) and Essay Encoding (F08) with no rate limit. Not available in P0, PoV Intro (F16a), P2 L4W, or Question Bank.

features.name: MCQ practices — Essay Encoding
features.description: L4M, L2M, L1M (practices array indices 4, 5, 6). L3M retired — replaced by L3M_POV in F16b. One question at a time, 5 options. Peek available (no rate limit). Pattern A per-item retry: wrong answer shows red X indicator (no correct answer revealed), V2 auto-loads immediately. Retry cycle: V1 → V2 → V1. After 3 failures: forced advance, failed_advanced: true on that item. Lives in /unit/:unitId/p1/essay-encoding.

features.name: Scramble practices
features.description: L1S/L2S click-to-place word bank. L3S drag-to-order. Peek available. Pattern A per-arrangement retry. Same items reload on retry. After 3 failures: forced advance. Lives in /unit/:unitId/p1/essay-encoding (practices array indices 7–9). L4S dropped.

features.name: Fill practices
features.description: L1F (index 11): POS hints + similar_phrases always visible, no word bank, case-insensitive match, peek available, Pattern A per-section retry. L2F (index 12): hint_sentences visible, no pass/fail, always advances on submit, output silently discarded, no retry versions. Both live in /unit/:unitId/p1/essay-encoding.

features.name: P2 — Applying write
features.description: Two screens: (1) /unit/:unitId/p2/intro — phase entry screen with guiding content, CTA links to p2 write (no phase change); (2) /unit/:unitId/p2 — L4W on model essay question (same as P0), collapsible lexical items panel + syntax patterns panel, no peek, 40-min countdown, no pass/fail — always advances. Submission = unit gate. Artifact 2 sent to EC. Save point.

features.name: Unit completion
features.description: Unit complete screen after L4W submit. Next unit unlocks (or path complete screen if last unit). Q Bank unlock notification: show which new questions were added. Buttons: Go to Question Bank / Next Unit. Includes guiding content about Q Bank availability.

features.name: Educator Console
features.description: Teacher auth, student list filtered by teacher_code. Per completed unit: Artifact 1 (P0 cold essay) + Artifact 2 (L4W post-encoding essay) — both on same question. Numbered Free Practice artifacts from Q Bank. Signals: time per practice, total accumulated time, pass/fail, failed_advanced. No peek_count.

features.name: Question Bank
features.description: P3 free practice. Three question states: attempted / unlocked / locked (shows unlock trigger unit). Free L4W write on any unlocked question. 40-min countdown. No scaffold, no peek, no hints. Submit → Numbered Free Practice artifact to EC. No gate, no pass/fail. Student can re-attempt same question — each submit creates a new numbered artifact.

features.name: Arcjet security
features.description: Rate limiting, bot detection, XSS/SQLi shield

features.name: PoV Introduction Screen
features.description: New route /unit/:unitId/p1/pov-intro. Renders POV_INTRO practice (practices array index 1). One PoV card per direction in essay: argument as heading, logic as body, Dive Deep button linked to blog_url (disabled/greyed when null). No questions, no timer, no Peek. CTA: 'I have understood these PoVs — ready to study the essay' → action advances currentPhase to p1_pov_encoding. No StudentAttempt rows written (POV_INTRO has no pass tracking). Guiding content shown above cards.

features.name: PoV Encoding sub-route
features.description: New route /unit/:unitId/p1/pov-encoding. Renders L3M_POV (index 2) then L2M_POV (index 3) in sequence. Two-stage component: (1) reading_essay stage — full model essay shown inline as mandatory reading block before questions unlock, CTA to advance; (2) practice stage — MCQPractice component renders L3M_POV questions then L2M_POV questions sequentially. StopwatchTimer and Peek modal available during practice stage. On completion: currentPhase advances to p1_essay_encoding. StudentAttempt rows written per item.
